message:
test(fuzz): add HelloReplayWindow state-machine fuzz target (resolves p5ams)

HelloReplayWindow (session.rs:553-599) is the bounded-FIFO replay-
protection gate consulted by verify_hello_attested_with_replay
(session.rs:650-662). A regression in its bookkeeping either re-opens
handshake replay (admit duplicate inside active window), bypasses the
capacity cap (memory amplification), or evicts too aggressively (also
replay-class).

Existing fcp-protocol fuzz coverage (session_metamorphic,
session_cookie_binding, derive_session_keys, session_transcript,
session) does NOT exercise HelloReplayWindow.

Four properties driven by an external FIFO model that mirrors the
window:
- first-time accept on never-seen (from, nonce)
- immediate-replay reject on just-inserted hello
- check ⇔ check_and_update agreement against the model after every op
- (from, nonce) keying invariance — both fields participate

Once-gated regression anchors:
- (a) capacity=3, insert h0..h3 → h0 MUST be evicted; re-inserting
  h0 succeeds; h1..h3 immediate-replay rejected (FIFO order check)
- (b) same nonce/different from MUST both be admitted; same from/
  different nonce MUST both be admitted (keying parity guard)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -547,5 +547,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_hello_replay_window"
+path = "fuzz_targets/hello_replay_window.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
